name: team-dynamic-test
description: Test dynamic fan-out — partition step generates work items, loop_from spawns agents

steps.command: echo '[{"page": "home", "route": "/"}, {"page": "about", "route": "/about"}, {"page": "settings", "route": "/settings"}, {"page": "profile", "route": "/profile"}, {"page": "dashboard", "route": "/dashboard"}]' > .wheel/outputs/work-items.json && cat .wheel/outputs/work-items.json | jq length && echo 'items generated'

echo '## Dynamic Team Test Results' && echo '' && echo 'Work items: 5, Max agents: 3' && echo 'Expected: 3 agents with round-robin distribution (2+2+1)' && echo '' && echo 'Summary:' && cat .wheel/outputs/dynamic-summary.json 2>/dev/null | jq '.' && echo '' && echo 'Collected:' && find .wheel/outputs/dynamic-results/ -type f 2>/dev/null | sort
